prompt.name: Coherence Phase 24 -- S24.2 纵向测试
prompt.sub_stage_name: 模拟多轮教学 -> 验证字段完整性和持久化
prompt.role: 需要一个新的测试文件验证多轮教学后系统状态正确。 当前 1284+ 个测试全部是单轮模式。 这是系统第一个纵向测试。
prompt.context: 约束: - 新建 tests/test_phase24_longitudinal.py - 不需要 DEEPSEEK_API_KEY - pytest 风格, 自动收集
prompt.task:
新建 tests/test_phase24_longitudinal.py:
from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent from src.coach.persistence import SessionPersistence
class TestLongitudinal: """多轮教学后验证系统状态。"""
def test_agent_output_has_all_phase_fields(self): """单次 act() 输出应包含 Phase 19-24 全部字段。""" agent = CoachAgent() r = agent.act("test longitudinal") expected_keys = [ "action_type", "payload", "llm_generated", "llm_model", "llm_tokens", "personalization_evidence", "memory_status", "difficulty_contract", "diagnostic_result", "diagnostic_probe", "ttm_stage", "sdt_profile", "flow_channel", ] for k in expected_keys: assert k in r, f"missing key: {k}"
def test_session_persistence_increments(self): """每轮对话后 total_turns 应递增。""" agent = CoachAgent(session_id="test_long_turns_24") agent.act("turn 1") p1 = SessionPersistence("test_long_turns_24") t1 = p1.get_profile().get("total_turns", 0) agent.act("turn 2") p2 = SessionPersistence("test_long_turns_24") t2 = p2.get_profile().get("total_turns", 0) assert t2 >= t1, f"turns should not decrease: {t1} -> {t2}"
def test_multiple_turns_no_crash(self): """多轮对话不应崩溃。""" agent = CoachAgent(session_id="test_long_stress_24") for i in range(10): r = agent.act(f"message {i}") assert "action_type" in r, f"crash at turn {i}"
